codeReview.summary: The purchasing frontend handoff section is expanded and comprehensive for VAL-DOC-006 scope. It documents supplier endpoints, PO/GRN/purchase/return endpoints, flow sequences, lifecycle/state-machine notes, error-code handling, DTO contracts, and UI hints. The documented endpoint inventory aligns with current purchasing controllers and DTOs, and the section clearly calls out present API limitations (e.g., PO create-only workflow) so frontend consumers can implement correctly.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission-level guidance still records stale baseline test counts in AGENTS despite updated gate-fast totals, which can cause validator/handoff drift when workers quote expected counts.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS baseline section still references 369 tests while current gate-fast output in this session shows 378 tests passing.

summary: Pass. The purchasing frontend handoff documentation now covers the requested supplier and P2P frontend integration contract with accurate endpoint, flow, state, and DTO details.
